name: the-machine
description: Reusable Claude Code plugins — brand-agnostic skills, agents, and MCP configs.

plugins.name: email-marketing
plugins.description: Per-brand email marketing agent team — weekly newsletter production: trend research with a deduplicated topic log, brand-voiced copywriting (subject + A/B variants, preview text, email-safe HTML body), Higgsfield image generation, adversarial QA, and draft delivery to Mailchimp, Klaviyo, Constant Contact, Omnisend, Moosend, or MoeGo. Drafts only — never sends.

plugins.name: human-resources
plugins.description: Per-client HR department — brand-agnostic skills and agents across the full HR lifecycle: recruitment, onboarding, compensation & benefits, performance, training, employee & labor relations, compliance, policy/handbook, health-safety-wellness, DEI, records/HRIS, scheduling, workforce strategy, and offboarding. Produces review-ready drafts and reports into the client project — never legal advice, never sends, never mutates live systems without confirmation.

plugins.name: grants
plugins.description: Per-client grants department — brand-agnostic grant research and scoring. The grant-researcher finds real, currently-open or upcoming grants that fit the organization's niche via web search, verifies each on its primary source, and scores it 0–100 for fit and win-likelihood (eligibility gate + five weighted dimensions), producing a ranked, sourced report and a dedup research log into the client project. Expired grants are never surfaced. Decision support only — never submits applications.
